## What does this PR add or change?
- [ ] New question(s)
- [ ] Fix / correction to an existing question
- [ ] Docs / tooling

**Domain(s):**
**Number of questions added:**

## Contributor checklist
- [ ] Follows the format in `QUESTION_TEMPLATE.md`
- [ ] The stem contains a decisive qualifier (MOST / LEAST / HIGHEST / LOWEST …)
- [ ] Exactly one best answer (or the stated count for multi-response)
- [ ] Each distractor has a single, precise reason it fails
- [ ] Any time-sensitive AWS fact is verified with a source link
- [ ] Includes a Mermaid diagram (no ASCII art)
- [ ] Correct-answer letters are varied across the set (not all "A")
